title: goodyera araneosa
intro: Goodyera araneosa, also known as the Spider Orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to Asia, characterized by its unique, spider-like habit and long-lasting flowers. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in China, for its purported anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. It is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Goodyera araneosa is often combined with other plants or used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential interactions and side effects.
